name: gradientEnd
description: End-stop color for the `gradient` variant. Defaults to the `--gradient-end` token.

name: open
description: Show / hide the alert. Two-way bindable.

name: collapsed
description: Collapse toggle on the title. `undefined` disables the affordance entirely; `true`/`false` enables a click-to-collapse handle on the title with a `Plus` / `Minus` icon. Two-way bindable.

name: progress
description: Progress bar at the bottom, 0–100. `0` hides the bar.

name: page
description: Current page (1-based). `0` disables the pagination UI. Two-way bindable.

name: icon
description: Icon rendered in the left strip (50px wide, centered).

name: title
description: Title row. Click-to-collapse if `collapsed` is a boolean.

name: pagesContent
description: Per-page content. Receives the current 1-based page as its argument.

name: onclose
description: Fires when the close button is clicked.

name: onbeforechange
description: Fires right before `page` changes through the built-in pager.
